findings.summary: The duplicate idempotency path was implemented but did not have direct regression coverage.
findings.resolution: Added a saved-search alert test proving P2002 duplicate delivery creation is not counted as sent or errored and does not enqueue duplicate outbox work.

rationale: Match code no longer sends email or creates in-app notifications directly, durable delivery records are queued with stable idempotency keys, outbox supports ALERT_MATCH and ALERT_DELIVER, and focused tests cover queueing, duplicate suppression, telemetry compatibility, and routing.
next_action: Proceed to final revalidation, kill switch, and runbook slice.
